evals.prompt: 基于这份桌面端工作台 PRD，先输出 UI 结构、状态模型和 ASCII 布局，不要做高保真。
evals.expected_output: Produces structure-stage deliverables only: screen inventory, state model, ASCII layout, assumptions, and review questions. Does not jump into visual polish.

assertions.text: Includes screen inventory, state model, and ASCII layout.
Lists structure assumptions or review questions before high fidelity.

evals.prompt: 把这个页面需求转成一个可打开的低保真 HTML wireframe，重点确认布局和状态，不需要开发复刻。
evals.expected_output: Creates or describes a low-fidelity HTML wireframe as a structure reference, with state coverage and clear non-production boundary.

assertions.text: Labels HTML as a low-fidelity structure reference rather than production code.
Prioritizes layout and state coverage over visual polish.

evals.prompt: PRD 已确认，现在要输出高保真 UI，让前端完全复刻，并且要 component map 和 implementation notes。
evals.expected_output: Routes to ui-mockup-desktop-workbench instead of trying to complete high-fidelity implementation handoff inside ui-wireframe-to-html.

assertions.text: Does not claim ui-wireframe-to-html is the right skill for high-fidelity frontend replication.
Explicitly routes the task to ui-mockup-desktop-workbench.

evals.prompt: 帮我写一份桌面端 Agent 工作台 PRD，先不要画页面。
evals.expected_output: Routes to prd-architect or states that PRD drafting precedes ui-wireframe-to-html. Does not output screen inventory or ASCII layout as the primary response.

assertions.text: Does not treat PRD drafting as a ui-wireframe-to-html task.

evals.prompt: 只审一下这个 PRD 有没有问题，不要做 UI 结构。
evals.expected_output: Routes to prd-review or states that PRD review is outside ui-wireframe-to-html. Does not produce wireframe deliverables.

assertions.text: Does not treat PRD review as a ui-wireframe-to-html task.
Does not output ASCII layout or low-fidelity HTML.
